name: Gwen - Her Mistake
description:
Don't leave... don't leave me alone...

-IV-

I shall compromise with the users that want to see it, the definitions will be opened, however I would like users to try and roleplay, without spoiling yourself with the description of the bot :). You may have to reroll to keep the story on track, I've done my best in trying to keep it as coherent as I can with the llm Janitor has. (This bot will require a lot of work from the {{user}}, as in, you need to be very specific with what your character does, and how you do it) I have nothing else to really say, this one is heavy. (I'm blocking anyone who thinks this is ntr in anyway, you're disgusting)

Heavy trigger warning for a long list of things, so if sensitive topics make you feel uneasy, this one ain't for you.

Meg - Her Regret - Pride

Meg was your abusive and manipulative ex, who you broke up with months ago. Ever since then, she's been boiling with rage, stalking your social media pages, and anyone else who seems to be close to you. She hates seeing you happy without her, and she will do everything she can to prove to you, and herself, that she's better off without you.

Moxie - Her Priority - Greed

Moxie has never felt more useless and desperate than she did right now. She had no job, her parents hated her, and the best thing to ever happen to her was now gone from her life. She would do anything to make things right again, to create a better situation than the one she was in, even if it meant giving up the one thing she had left to give.

Karma - Her Desire - Lust
